subcodes.first_line: The divine Call is raised continually, and the horizon of manifestation is illumined with the lights of His countenance. Blessed are they who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندای الهی در کل حین مرتفعست و افق ظهور بانوار وجه منور طوبی از برای نفوسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @regarding the receptivity of the hearer in teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @knowledge; recognition of God, @development of capacity and readiness, @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
